overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a character walking along a sunny coastal beach toward a distinctive haystack rock formation, then turning to traverse a rocky shoreline with trees. The scene features high-fidelity rendering typical of Unreal Engine 5 with dynamic shadows, realistic water, and a visible interaction prompt UI element.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with tidal flats

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the flat sandy beach toward the large rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: large monolithic rock formation rising from the ocean water
calm sea water stretching to the horizon under the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an expansive sandy beach under a bright blue sky with scattered cumulus clouds. The large haystack rock formation dominates the distant center view while the calm ocean stretches to the horizon. The camera follows smoothly from a third-person perspective as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with overhanging trees

events.description: character makes a sharp right turn toward the rocky shoreline with coastal vegetation
ground surface transitions from flat sand to uneven rocky boulders as character climbs onto the shore

agents.ego_description: turning toward the rocky coastline and carefully navigating over the uneven boulders near the trees

entered.detail: green leafy trees with spreading branches overhanging the rocky shore
large gray rocks and boulders forming an uneven terrain along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character turns right away from the open beach approach toward a rocky shoreline lined with coastal trees. The ground becomes uneven as the character climbs onto large boulders, transitioning from sand to rock. The haystack rock formation and ocean shift to the left side of the frame as the camera follows the character exploring the rocky terrain under the tree canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive, open beach into a rugged, tree-lined rocky shoreline. It begins with the character walking steadily across bright sand under a blue sky, moving toward a massive haystack rock formation that dominates the distant horizon. As the character reaches the edge of the open beach, the camera follows a rightward turn that shifts the ocean and rock formation to the left of the frame. The terrain then transforms from smooth sand to uneven boulders, leading the character upward and away from the coast. Finally, the scene opens into a shaded coastal area as the character traverses the rocky ground beneath a canopy of trees.
